founder: 卡尔·弗朗茨·巴利（Carl Franz Bally）和弗里茨·巴利（Fritz Bally）
current_slogan: Bally — 瑞士工艺，经典传承
description_zh: Bally（巴利）是瑞士最负盛名的奢侈鞋履和配饰品牌之一，由卡尔·巴利（Carl Bally）于1851年在瑞士舍嫩韦德创立。品牌起源于对高品质鞋履的追求，最初专注于生产手工制作的绅士皮鞋，以瑞士精密制造工艺和优雅的设计迅速赢得国际声誉。1851年，卡尔·巴利在旅行中看到一双精致的芭蕾舞鞋，受到启发而创立了Bally鞋厂。19世纪末，Bally已成为欧洲最知名的鞋履品牌之一，在巴黎、伦敦、维也纳和纽约等国际都市开设了专卖店，是最早实现全球化的奢侈品牌之一。品牌标志性的产品包括男士和女士正装鞋、休闲鞋、手提包、皮带和各类小皮具。Bally的设计理念融合了古典优雅与现代摩登，既保留了瑞士精密制造的传统精髓，又不断融入当代时尚元素。在生产过程中，Bally坚持严格的质量标准，每一双鞋都需要经过上百道工序，其中包括大量的手工操作。Bally的档案馆收藏了超过1.5万双历史鞋款，跨越170多年，见证了近两个世纪的时尚变迁。2007年之后品牌经历了多次创意总监的更替，在设计风格上不断演变。2020年代Bally重新聚焦瑞士制鞋传统，推出了更多致敬经典的款式。2018年Bally加入JAB控股集团，品牌加速了在亚洲市场的拓展步伐。如今Bally在50多个国家拥有超过300家门店，是全球知名的奢侈鞋履品牌。Bally的皮具产品同样享有盛誉，其精湛的皮革工艺和经典的设计使每一件产品都成为经久不衰的时尚单品。品牌的红色条纹标识已成为品质和奢华的象征，深受全球消费者的喜爱。在可持续时尚方面，Bally也在积极探索，推出使用环保材料的产品系列，并优化供应链的可持续性。Bally的客户群体涵盖商务人士、时尚爱好者和追求品质生活的消费者，品牌一直保持着低调而优雅的瑞士风格。2023年，Bally任命了新的创意总监，为品牌带来了更具现代感的设计语言，同时尊重品牌170多年的历史传承。BALLY保持了瑞士品牌一贯的谦逊和低调气质，不为潮流所动，坚持自己的设计语言和品质追求，这是品牌历经170多年依然屹立的核心原因。

languages.zh-CN: Bally（巴利）是瑞士最负盛名的奢侈鞋履和配饰品牌之一，由卡尔·巴利（Carl Bally）于1851年在瑞士舍嫩韦德创立。品牌起源于对高品质鞋履的追求，最初专注于生产手工制作的绅士皮鞋，以瑞士精密制造工艺和优雅的设计迅速赢得国际声誉。1851年，卡尔·巴利在旅行中看到一双精致的芭蕾舞鞋，受到启发而创立了Bally鞋厂。19世纪末，Bally已成为欧洲最知名的鞋履品牌之一，在巴黎、伦敦、维也纳和纽约等国际都市开设了专卖店，是最早实现全球化的奢侈品牌之一。品牌标志性的产品包括男士和女士正装鞋、休闲鞋、手提包、皮带和各类小皮具。Bally的设计理念融合了古典优雅与现代摩登，既保留了瑞士精密制造的传统精髓，又不断融入当代时尚元素。在生产过程中，Bally坚持严格的质量标准，每一双鞋都需要经过上百道工序，其中包括大量的手工操作。Bally的档案馆收藏了超过1.5万双历史鞋款，跨越170多年，见证了近两个世纪的时尚变迁。2007年之后品牌经历了多次创意总监的更替，在设计风格上不断演变。2020年代Bally重新聚焦瑞士制鞋传统，推出了更多致敬经典的款式。2018年Bally加入JAB控股集团，品牌加速了在亚洲市场的拓展步伐。如今Bally在50多个国家拥有超过300家门店，是全球知名的奢侈鞋履品牌。Bally的皮具产品同样享有盛誉，其精湛的皮革工艺和经典的设计使每一件产品都成为经久不衰的时尚单品。品牌的红色条纹标识已成为品质和奢华的象征，深受全球消费者的喜爱。在可持续时尚方面，Bally也在积极探索，推出使用环保材料的产品系列，并优化供应链的可持续性。Bally的客户群体涵盖商务人士、时尚爱好者和追求品质生活的消费者，品牌一直保持着低调而优雅的瑞士风格。2023年，Bally任命了新的创意总监，为品牌带来了更具现代感的设计语言，同时尊重品牌170多年的历史传承。BALLY保持了瑞士品牌一贯的谦逊和低调气质，不为潮流所动，坚持自己的设计语言和品质追求，这是品牌历经170多年依然屹立的核心原因。
languages.en:
Bally International Ltd. is a Swiss luxury fashion house and company founded in 1851 by brothers Carl Franz Bally and Fritz Bally based in Caslano, Switzerland. Traditionally the brand was most known for its shoes but has ever since also diversified into leather goods, bags, baggage, accessories and ready-to-wear. Bally's current creative director is Simone Bellotti, who succeeded Rhuigi Villaseñor, who was its creative director from  2022-2023. It has been continuously owned and managed by the Bally family for six generations until 1999, when it was sold to TPG Inc., a private equity firm, based in San Francisco. In 2008, it was sold to Labelux Group (presently known as JAB Holding Company) which is ultimately owned by the German Reimann family. Currently, Bally is owned by Regent, a California-based private equity firm. == History ==

Bally was founded as a shoe making business in 1851 by Carl Franz Bally and his brother Fritz in the basement of their family home in Schönenwerd, Solothurn, Switzerland. Carl Franz Bally had joined the family business, a silk ribbon manufacturer, when he was 17, but decided to go into shoe manufacturing after a stay in Paris. After Carl's death in 1899, the company continued under the management of Carl's sons, Eduard and Arthur and continued to manufacture about two million pairs of shoes a year, employing 3,200 people. == Modern era ==
From 1977 to 1999, Bally was owned by Oerlikon-Bührle. The brand first entered China in 1986, and the country has become its largest market since. After plans for an initial public offering were called off in 1998, Texas Pacific Group acquired Bally from Oerlikon-Bührle. From 1999 to 2001, the company moved most of its activities from Schönenwerd to Caslano. In 2008, Texas Pacific Group sold Bally International AG to Vienna-based Labelux Group, part of Joh A. Benckiser, for $596 million. JAB moved Bally's headquarters to London. The company announced Frédéric de Narp, a former executive at Harry Winston, would become its chief executive officer in November 2013. During his tenure, de Narp worked with Pablo Coppola as design director (2014–2016), hired David Chipperfield to refurbish the brand's stores and put a bigger focus on womenswear. In 2015, Bally took over Italian leather goods company Zagliani's Milan atelier for its in-house production of high-end bags and accessories.
languages.fr:
Découvrez l'histoire fascinante de cette maison de mode emblématique. Bally International Ltd. is a Swiss luxury fashion house and company founded in 1851 by brothers Carl Franz Bally and Fritz Bally based in Caslano, Switzerland. Traditionally the brand was most known for its shoes but has ever since also diversified into leather goods, bags, baggage, accessories and ready-to-wear. Bally's current creative director is Simone Bellotti, who succeeded Rhuigi Villaseñor, who was its creative director from  2022-2023. It has been continuously owned and managed by the Bally family for six generations until 1999, when it was sold to TPG Inc., a private equity firm, based in San Francisco. In 2008, it was sold to Labelux Group (presently known as JAB Holding Company) which is ultimately owned by the German Reimann family. Currently, Bally is owned by Regent, a California-based private equity firm. == History ==

Bally was founded as a shoe making business in 1851 by Carl Franz Bally and his brother Fritz in the basement of their family home in Schönenwerd, Solothurn, Switzerland. Carl Franz Bally had joined the family business, a silk ribbon manufacturer, when he was 17, but decided to go into shoe manufacturing after a stay in Paris. After Carl's death in 1899, the company continued under the management of Carl's sons, Eduard and Arthur and continued to manufacture about two million pairs of shoes a year, employing 3,200 people. == Modern era ==
From 1977 to 1999, Bally was owned by Oerlikon-Bührle. The brand first entered China in 1986, and the country has become its largest market since. After plans for an initial public offering were called off in 1998, Texas Pacific Group acquired Bally from Oerlikon-Bührle. From 1999 to 2001, the company moved most of its activities from Schönenwerd to Caslano. In 2008, Texas Pacific Group sold Bally International AG to Vienna-based Labelux Group, part of Joh A. Benckiser, for $596 million. JAB moved Bally's headquarters to London. The company announced Frédéric de Narp, a former executive at Harry Winston, would become its chief executive officer in November 2013. During his tenure, de Narp worked with Pablo Coppola as design director (2014–2016), hired David Chipperfield to refurbish the brand's stores and put a bigger focus on womenswear. In 2015, Bally took over Italian leather goods company Zagliani's Milan atelier for its in-house production of high-end bags and accessories. From 2017, the company started to consolidate its operations in Milan and Caslano. That same year, the company also opened a new, 15,120 square feet manufacturing facility in Lastra a Signa.

The company announced Frédéric de Narp, a former executive at Harry Winston, would become its chief executive officer in November 2013.
languages.ja: バリー（Bally）は、カール・バリーによって1851年にスイスのシェーネンヴェルトで設立された、スイスを代表する高級靴・アクセサリーブランドです。高品質な靴への追求から始まり、当初は紳士用のハンドメイド革靴の製造に特化。スイスの精密な製造技術とエレガントなデザインで国際的な評価を獲得しました。創業のきっかけは、カール・バリーが旅先で見かけた精巧なバレエシューズに感銘を受けたことでした。19世紀末にはヨーロッパで最も有名な靴ブランドの一つとなり、パリ、ロンドン、ウィーン、ニューヨークなどの国際都市に直営店をオープン。最も早期にグローバル展開を果たしたラグジュアリーブランドの一つです。代表的な製品には紳士・婦人用のフォーマルシューズ、カジュアルシューズ、ハンドバッグ、ベルト、各種スモールレザーグッズが含まれます。デザイン哲学はクラシックな優雅さとモダンな感覚を融合させたもので、スイスの精密製造の伝統を守りながらも、常に現代的なファッション要素を取り入れています。製造工程では厳格な品質基準を遵守し、一足の靴に100以上の工程を要し、その多くに手作業が含まれます。ブランドのアーカイブには1万5千足以上の履物が収蔵されており、170年以上にわたるファッションの歴史を物語っています。2007年以降はクリエイティブディレクターの交代が続き、デザインも時代とともに進化。2020年代にはスイスの製靴の伝統に再び焦点を当て、クラシックなスタイルを復活させています。2018年にJABホールディングスグループに加わり、アジア市場での展開を加速。現在では50カ国以上に300以上の店舗を展開しています。レザーグッズも高い評価を得ており、熟練の職人技とクラシックなデザインが魅力的な製品を生み出しています。ブランドのアイコンである赤いストライプのロゴは、品質とラグジュアリーの象徴として広く認知されています。サステナビリティにも積極的に取り組み、環境に配慮した素材の使用や持続可能なサプライチェーンの構築を進めています。2023年には新しいクリエイティブディレクターを迎え、170年以上の歴史を尊重しながらも、よりモダンなデザイン言語をブランドに取り入れています。
languages.ko: 발리(Bally)는 칼 발리가 1851년 스위스 셰넨벨트에서 설립한 스위스를 대표하는 고급 신발 및 액세서리 브랜드입니다.고품질 신발에 대한 추구에서 시작되어 처음에는 남성용 핸드메이드 가죽 신발 제조에 특화되었습니다.스위스의 정밀한 제조 기술과 우아한 디자인으로 국제적 명성을 얻었습니다.창업 계기는 칼 발리가 여행 중 우연히 본 정교한 발레 슈즈에 감명을 받은 것이었습니다.19세기 말에는 유럽에서 가장 유명한 신발 브랜드 중 하나가 되어 파리, 런던, 비엔나, 뉴욕 등국제 도시에 직영 매장을 오픈했습니다. 가장 일찍 글로벌 확장을 이룬 럭셔리 브랜드 중 하나입니다.대표 제품으로는 남성 및 여성용 정장 구두, 캐주얼 슈즈, 핸드백, 벨트, 각종 스몰 레더 굿즈가 있습니다.디자인 철학은 클래식한 우아함과 모던한 감각을 융합한 것으로, 스위스 정밀 제조의 전통을 지키면서도현대적인 패션 요소를 지속적으로 도입하고 있습니다. 제조 과정에서는 엄격한 품질 기준을 준수하며,한 켤레의 신발에 100개 이상의 공정이 필요하고 그중 많은 부분이 수작업으로 이루어집니다.브랜드 아카이브에는 1만 5천 켤레 이상의 신발이 보존되어 170년 이상의 패션 역사를 보여줍니다.2007년 이후 크리에이티브 디렉터의 교체가 이어지며 디자인도 시대와 함께 진화했습니다.2020년대에는 스위스 제화 전통에 다시 초점을 맞추며 클래식 스타일을 부활시키고 있습니다.2018년 JAB 홀딩스 그룹에 합류하여 아시아 시장에서의 전개를 가속화했습니다.현재 50개국 이상에 300개 이상의 매장을 운영하고 있습니다. 가죽 제품도 높은 평가를 받고 있으며,숙련된 장인의 기술과 클래식한 디자인이 매력적인 제품을 만들어냅니다.브랜드의 아이콘인 빨간색 스트라이프 로고는 품질과 럭셔리의 상징으로 널리 인식되고 있습니다.지속 가능성에도 적극적으로 대응하며 친환경 소재 사용과 지속 가능한 공급망 구축을 추진하고 있습니다.2023년 새로운 크리에이티브 디렉터를 영입하여 170년 이상의 역사를 존중하면서도더욱 모던한 디자인 언어를 브랜드에 도입하고 있습니다.
languages.ar: اغوص في تاريخ هذه العلامة التجارية الفاخرة. Bally International Ltd. is a Swiss luxury fashion house and company founded in 1851 by brothers Carl Franz Bally and Fritz Bally based in Caslano, Switzerland. Traditionally the brand was most known for its shoes but has ever since also diversified into leather goods, bags, baggage, accessories and ready-to-wear. Bally's current creative director is Simone Bellotti, who succeeded Rhuigi Villaseñor, who was its creative director from  2022-2023. It has been continuously owned and managed by the Bally family for six generations until 1999, when it was sold to TPG Inc., a private equity firm, based in San Francisco. In 2008, it was sold to Labelux Group (presently known as JAB Holding Company) which is ultimately owned by the German Reimann family. Currently, Bally is owned by Regent, a California-based private equity firm.   == History ==  Bally was founded as a shoe making business in 1851 by Carl Franz Bally and his brother Fritz in the basement of their family home in Schönenwerd, Solothurn, Switzerland تتمتع هذه العلامة التجارية بدعم كبير من عشاق الموضة حول العالم، وتشتهر بتصاميمها المبتكرة وجودتها الاستثنائية. تواصل العلامة التجارية ريادتها في الصناعة، مبدعة اتجاهات جديدة ومستقبل الموضة. تحترم التقاليد بينما تقدم مجموعات مبتكرة تواكب تغيرات العصر. تدير متاجر رئيسية في المدن الكبرى حول العالم، وتواصل توسعها العالمي بنشاط. من اختيار المواد إلى عمليات التصنيع، تطبق أعلى معايير مراقبة الجودة في كل مرحلة. تتبنى الاستدامة بنشاط، وتدفع نحو تطوير منتجات صديقة للبيئة. يستمر إرث العلامة التجارية وابتكارها في التأثير على المصممين والمبدعين من الجيل القادم.
